About CSorro OS

The operating system for the work behind creative business.

CSorro OS exists to bring projects, people, assets, clients, reviews, invoices, reports and AI into one connected workspace — so teams can move from idea to delivery without losing context.

Explore the product →Founder story
BriefPlanCreateReviewApproveInvoice
1Operating system10+Connected modules0Lost context24/7Workspace memory

The problem

Creative teams are not short of tools. They are short of connection.

Projects live in task boards. Messages disappear in chat. Files sit in drives. Feedback is buried in comments. Clients sit in a CRM. Invoices and reports are rebuilt at the end. CSorro OS is built to stop that split — by keeping the work, the people and the decisions together.

▣

One place for the operation

CSorro OS is not just another app. It is the home for the business behind the creative work: projects, files, reviews, clients, schedules, reports and payments all connected.

☰

Simple on the surface

The interface should feel calm, clean and obvious — even when the work underneath is complex.

⚙

Powerful underneath

Roles, permissions, workspace storage, review history, reports, CRM and AI support the operation without overwhelming the team.

✓

Context stays attached

Every brief, task, file, comment, approval and invoice belongs to the project it came from.

◇

Built from real workflow

The product comes from real production management: creative projects, teams, clients, approvals, deadlines and delivery pressure.

What CSorro brings together

The creative workflow and the business operation in one system.

Each module is useful by itself, but the real value is how they connect. When a project moves, the files, people, messages, approvals and business context move with it.

01

Projects

Plan work, set priorities, track progress and keep delivery clear.

02

Storage

Organise folders, creative assets, versions and workspace files.

03

Studio Review

Review clips, thumbnails and creative work with approval history.

04

CRM

Keep clients, contacts, notes and delivery records connected.

05

Invoices

Turn completed work into billing without rebuilding the story.

06

Reports

Generate updates from the work already inside the workspace.

07

Calendar

See what is happening across projects, reviews and deadlines.

08

AI

Summarise, organise, brief and report with project context.

09

People

Invite teams, freelancers, clients and collaborators.

10

Permissions

Control who can view, edit, approve and manage each area.

The philosophy

Calm enough for daily use. Strong enough to run the business.

CSorro OS should not make a team feel like they have more admin. It should make the next step obvious, the latest version easy to find, the right person accountable and the full story available when it is time to report, invoice or hand over.

Clarity over clutterConnected workflowsWorkspace-first controlReal operationsCreative speed

The workflow

From first brief to final archive.

BriefPlanAssignCreateReviewApproveInvoiceReportArchive

Mission

To empower creators by bringing people, projects and production together in one operating system — making it easier to collaborate, stay organised and turn ambitious ideas into reality.

Vision

To become the operating system behind the world's most successful creative projects.

In five years

“If you're serious about creating, you're using CSorro OS.”

Founder story

Built by someone who has lived the chaos behind creative production.

This About page is for the company and the concept. The Founder page stays separate, with Cristian Sorensen’s background, production experience, creator work and personal story.
